name: cpig-bool-refactor-05-smoothunion-k0-collapse
description: CRITICAL REGRESSION GUARD for Phase 1 operator answer #1 (2026-06-20): CPigSmoothUnion with smoothK=0 must COLLAPSE to a regular UNION (no NaN, no divide-by-zero). Pre-Phase-1 closure evaluated smin with k=0 → h*h/(4*k) divides by zero → NaN propagates through the marcher → empty viewport. Phase 1's field_binary_impl case 3 explicitly checks `if (k > 0.0f) Kind::SMOOTH_UNION else Kind::UNION`. If this regression returns, the SDF evaluates to NaN, no surface is found, no real frame presents, gate times out, test Crashes. Visual: identical to a regular union of two libfive spheres (peanut shape) — proves the collapse worked.

checkpoints.name: smoothunion-k0-collapse
checkpoints.description: SmoothUnion(sphere, sphere, k=0) — must render IDENTICALLY to a regular union (peanut shape, sharp seam). If empty viewport / NaN field, the Phase 1 k=0 → UNION collapse regressed.
